title: Editor, Filter & Detail Panel Accessibility
description: Add accessible names to MarkdownEditor toolbar buttons, fix JobFilters form control label associations, add aria-label to CalendarEventDetail close button and keyboard navigation, add aria-hidden to decorative CalendarEventsList icons, fix DetailPanelNotes section heading semantics, add aria-describedby to SaveSearchPopover form fields, and ensure TemplateBar template buttons have accessible names.

userStories.title: Add aria-labels to MarkdownEditor toolbar buttons
userStories.description: MarkdownEditor.jsx renders a rich-text toolbar with formatting buttons (bold, italic, heading, link, etc.) that are icon-only with no visible text. Each toolbar button must have an aria-label describing its action (e.g. 'Bold', 'Italic', 'Heading 1', 'Insert link'). Also add aria-hidden='true' to the icons within toolbar buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Each toolbar button in MarkdownEditor.jsx has a descriptive aria-label
Toolbar icons have aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Fix JobFilters form control label associations
userStories.description: JobFilters.jsx renders filter form controls (dropdowns, checkboxes, etc.) for filtering the job board. Verify each form control has a properly associated label via htmlFor/id pair or aria-label. Add missing associations where inputs lack accessible labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Every form control in JobFilters.jsx has an associated label (via htmlFor/id or aria-label)
No input is unlabeled
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-label to CalendarEventDetail close button
userStories.description: CalendarEventDetail.jsx renders an event detail panel/modal with a close button. If the close button is icon-only (X icon), it must have aria-label='Close event details' so screen reader users know its purpose.
acceptanceCriteria: CalendarEventDetail.jsx close button has aria-label='Close event details' (or equivalent)
The X icon within the close button has aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to decorative icons in CalendarEventsList
userStories.description: CalendarEventsList.jsx renders a list of calendar events, each with decorative status or type icons. These icons are purely decorative — the event title and time convey the information. Add aria-hidden='true' to all decorative icons in the events list.
acceptanceCriteria: CalendarEventsList.jsx decorative event icons have aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Fix DetailPanelNotes section heading semantics
userStories.description: DetailPanelNotes.jsx renders a 'Notes' section header as a non-semantic element (span or div) rather than a proper heading. Replace it with an appropriate heading element (h3 or h4) to support navigation by headings for screen reader users.
acceptanceCriteria: DetailPanelNotes.jsx 'Notes' section title uses a semantic heading element (h3 or h4)
The visual styling is preserved via className
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-describedby to SaveSearchPopover input fields
userStories.description: SaveSearchPopover.jsx has a form for naming and saving a search. If the form has helper text or validation error messages for the input fields, add aria-describedby linking each input to its helper/error text element so screen readers announce the context.
acceptanceCriteria: SaveSearchPopover.jsx form input(s) have aria-describedby pointing to helper text or error message elements when those elements exist
Helper/error text elements have matching id attributes
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add accessible names to TemplateBar template buttons
userStories.description: TemplateBar.jsx renders template selection buttons. If these buttons display only a short template name or icon without sufficient context for screen readers, add aria-label with the full template name or description.
acceptanceCriteria: Each template button in TemplateBar.jsx has an accessible name (either via visible text content or aria-label) that uniquely identifies the template
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to DetailPanelTimeline decorative stage icons
userStories.description: DetailPanelTimeline.jsx renders a timeline of application stage changes with stage icons or colored dots. These visual indicators are decorative — the stage name is conveyed by text. Add aria-hidden='true' to the decorative stage icon/dot elements.
acceptanceCriteria: DetailPanelTimeline.jsx decorative stage icons or dots have aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors
